reasoning: The limiter we're addressing is your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, which is holding back your sustained climbing power. Your last ride was a solid recovery effort, setting us up to attack this limiter effectively. Focusing on over-unders will closely mimic the demands you'll face on the Sundance to Cascade Springs segment of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 10 min over-under intervals: 8 min at 201-218W, 2 min at 242-256W, repeat for 4 sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
